name: Zucchini/Courgettes with Peanuts
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 c Peanuts; toasted and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the sliced zucchini/courgettes in very little boiling water for 5-10 minutes until they are very tender.
2. Drain well and put them in a bowl.
3. Add the garlic, lemon juice, margarine, salt, and pepper to the zucchini mixture and mash all ingredients with a fork.
4. If more lemon juice is needed, add it now.
5. Spoon the mash into a serving dish and scatter roasted peanuts on top before serving with millet or rice.
